data.title: tickets-tracker-guard hook false-positives on heredoc content containing .tickets-tracker string
data.description: The pre-bash tickets-tracker-guard hook blocks Bash commands that contain the string .tickets-tracker/ anywhere in the command text, including inside heredoc content or echo strings. This causes false positives when creating files (e.g., KNOWN-ISSUES.md) whose content mentions .tickets-tracker/ as documentation. Workaround: use Python open/append instead of heredoc.
